final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    output reg [7:0] count
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            count <= 8'b00000000;
        end else begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
